channelID.title: channelID
channelID.description: Slack Id of the channel to invite the users to

userID.title: userID
userID.description:
Collection of one or several Salesforce User ID of User to add to the slack channel.
A Salesforce User ID is a unique identifier assigned to each user in the system. It comes in two formats: a 15-character case-sensitive ID (used in the UI) and an 18-character case-insensitive ID (used in APIs and external systems). The ID always starts with 005, which indicates it’s a User record. The 18-character version includes a checksum to prevent issues in systems that aren’t case-sensitive.

NEVER ADD OR USE QUOTE ("") around the Salesforce User ID.
REMOVE ANY QUOTE ("") around the Salesforce USER ID.

Example of correct input : [005F9000009uitpIAA,005F9000009uUMrIAM]
